# Load files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"

    quran = json.load(f)

cands_wain = [v for v in quran if "وَإِنْ خِفْتُمْ" in v['ayah_text']]
len(cands_wain), [(v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in cands_wain[:10]]

import unicodedata
import re

def strip_diacritics(s):
    # Remove Arabic diacritics
    # Keep alif madda? We'll remove combining marks
    return ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFKD', s) 
                   if not unicodedata.combining(ch))

def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s.strip()
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')
    # unify hamza/alif forms: أإآا -> ا
    s = re.sub('[إأآٱ]', 'ا', s)
    # ya/ya alef maqsura: ى -> ي
    s = s.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # taa marbuta to ha? We'll keep ة->ه or toة? For search, maybe convert ة to ه or to ت؟ We'll keep as ه? I'll keep as ة unchanged to avoid mismatch; but for robust, convert to ه or just leave
    # We'll keep it as ه to unify with ta marbuta differences? Possibly not needed.
    # Actually leave unchanged.
    # waw hamza? ؤ -> و, ئ -> ي
    s = s.replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي')
    # Remove punctuation and non-letters digits
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]+', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # Remove diacritics
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    # lowercase not applicable
    # collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming LCS
    # to limit memory, we can compute with integer arrays
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # convert to list of chars
    A, B = a, b
    prev = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        cur = [0]*(m+1)
        ai = A[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            if ai == B[j-1]:
                cur[j] = prev[j-1] + 1
            else:
                if prev[j] >= cur[j-1]:
                    cur[j] = prev[j]
                else:
                    cur[j] = cur[j-1]
        prev = cur
    return prev[m]

def lcs_ratio(a, b):
    # char-level longest common subsequence ratio to max length
    L = lcs_length(a, b)
    return L / max(len(a), len(b)) if max(len(a), len(b))>0 else 0.0

def token_f1(a, b):
    toks_a = normalize_arabic(a).split()
    toks_b = normalize_arabic(b).split()
    # Use set-based?
    # We'll do multiset F1: compute overlap counts
    from collections import Counter
    ca, cb = Counter(toks_a), Counter(toks_b)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    prec = common / sum(ca.values()) if sum(ca.values())>0 else 0
    rec = common / sum(cb.values()) if sum(cb.values())>0 else 0
    if prec+rec==0: 
        f1 = 0
    else: 
        f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1, prec, rec, common, sum(ca.values()), sum(cb.values())

orig_full = "وَإِنْ خِفْتُمْ أَنْ تَجْرِبُوا أَزْوَاجَكُمْ فَزَوَّجُوا مَا أَحْبَبْتُمْ مِنْ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ أَوِ امْرَأَتَيْكُمْ أَوِ امْتَلِكُوا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمَاتِ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ"
cand = cands_wain[0]['ayah_text']
orig_norm = normalize_arabic(orig_full)
cand_norm = normalize_arabic(cand)
orig_norm, cand_norm[:60], len(orig_norm), len(cand_norm), lcs_ratio(orig_norm, cand_norm), token_f1(orig_full, cand)

cand_43
